studyName: A Multiethnic GWAS of Prostate Cancer

variables.name: age_cat
variables.description: Age at entry into cohort (baseline) in 5 year intervals

variables.name: ageco_cat
variables.description: Age at blood draw for controls

variables.name: agedx_cat
variables.description: Age at diagnosis for cancer cases

variables.name: bmi_cat
variables.description: Body mass index (BMI)

variables.name: currsmoke
variables.description: Currently smoke? (reported at baseline)

variables.name: d_calc_cat
variables.description: Density for calcium intake (milligrams per 1000 kilocalories per day) reported at baseline

variables.name: d_lyco_cat
variables.description: Density for lycopene intake (micrograms per 1000 kilocalories per day) reported at baseline

variables.name: dbgap_stat
variables.description: Provides information re submission of data to the NIH GWAS data repository (dbGaP).

variables.name: ethanol_ca
variables.description: Alcohol (drinks per day) reported at baseline

variables.name: ethni
variables.description: Self reported race/ethnicity

variables.name: eversmoke
variables.description: Ever smoke? (reported at baseline)

variables.name: fh_prca
variables.description: Family history of prostate cancer  (brother or father) reported at baseline

variables.name: geneva_id
variables.description: Unique identifier provided by GENEVA coordinating center (CC) for MEC subjects

variables.name: p_fat_cat
variables.description: Percent of calories from fat (%) reported at baseline

variables.name: pa_cat
variables.description: Hours per day of moderate or vigorous physical activity, on average, during the past year reported at baseline

variables.name: packyrs_ca
variables.description: Pack years of smoking (cigarettes) reported at baseline

variables.name: severity
variables.description: Aggressiveness of disease for prostate cancer cases only: calculated from SEER summary stage and differentiation variables (the latter provides an estimate of Gleason grade)
